    Skyler

    by Quail Studio
    Edition One
    Quail Studio Designs Ravelry Store
    Knitting
    Tops → Sleeveless Top
    March 2023
    Rowan Summerlite DK
    DK / 8 ply (11 wpi) ?
    22 stitches and 30 rows = 10 cm
    in Stockinette Stitch
    US 5 - 3.75 mm
    568 - 1136 yards (519 - 1039 m)
    28-30(32-34, 36-38, 40-42, 44-46, 48-50, 52-54, 56-58, 60-62)" 71-76(81-86, 91-97, 102-107, 112-117, 122-127, 133-137, 142-147, 152-154)CM

    This pattern is available for $7.50 USD buy it now

    You will need stitch holders.

    Finished measurements:
    Bust circumference: 33( 37, 41, 45, 48.75, 52.75, 56.75, 60.75, 65.25)“ 83.5( 94.5, 103.5, 113, 123.5, 131, 143.5, 154.5, 165.5) cm
    Finished length: 16.25( 16.5, 17, 17, 18, 18, 19.75, 20.5, 20.5)” 41( 42, 43, 43, 46, 46, 50, 52, 52) cm

    Yarn used:
    Rowan Summerlite DK
    A. 461 Khaki: 3(3, 3, 3, 4, 4, 4, 5, 5) balls
    B. 466 Seashell: 1(1, 1, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 3) balls
